title: Former Dentons Link Legal Partner Kshama A Loya launches specialist arbitration chambers in Mumbai
description: Former Dentons Link Legal Partner Kshama A Loya has announced the launch of her specialist arbitration chambers in Mumbai.The Chambers of Kshama A Loya will be focusing on:Commercial arbitration (domestic and international), bilateral investment treaty arbitration, arbitration-related litigation, pre and post-arbitration advisory, negotiation of settlements and enforcement of arbitral awards across jurisdictions; Disputes arising out of shareholder agreements and joint ventures, trade and invest
